tokenBoundary: External token reference only. Not sold, issued, brokered, custodied, distributed, redeemed, staked, or made available by GoalOS, MontrealAI, or QuebecAI.
claimBoundary: GoalOS is presented as a Holy Grail candidate for proof-gated open-ended work, not as proof that AGI, ASI, superintelligence, guaranteed returns, live settlement, or autonomous production authority has been achieved.
nextProof: Proof Run 001: publish a public-safe Evidence Docket that people can inspect and replay.

loop.label: Work
loop.caption: Agents/tools execute inside a scoped mission envelope.

loop.label: Proof
loop.caption: Artifacts, hashes, gates, costs, risks, and claims are packaged.

loop.label: Validation
loop.caption: Unsupported claims are rejected; evidence earns acceptance.

loop.label: Verified Experience
loop.caption: Accepted work becomes a reusable event, not a one-off answer.

loop.label: Chronicle
loop.caption: The institution remembers what was proven.

loop.label: Reusable Capability
loop.caption: Accepted patterns become future mission capacity.

loop.label: Settlement Signal
loop.caption: Proof can become economically consequential in gated protocol contexts.

loop.label: Reinvestment
loop.caption: Accepted capability funds harder future missions.

loop.label: Harder Mission
loop.caption: The next objective inherits only verified experience.
